title: Sysmon Mimikatz Named Pipe
description: Detects named pipe creation matching known Mimikatz pipe patterns. Mimikatz uses named pipes for credential extraction and token manipulation operations.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Pipe Name' like '*mimikatz*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*mimilib*' or 'Pipe Name' like '*mimidrv*')) or (('Pipe Name' = '\HID_CTRL' or 'Pipe Name' = '\Win32Pipes.')))
